tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Aint Got No I Got Life

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  x2

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
What would you do[/tab]

To get to me

What would you say

To have your way
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Would you give up[/tab]

Or try again

If I hesitate

To let you win
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Or would you be yourself[/tab]

Or play your role

Tell all the boys

Or keep it low
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
If I say no[/tab]

Would you turn away

Or play me off

Or would you stay

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
If at first you don't succeed[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Dust yourself off and try again[/tab]

You can dust it off and try again
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
If at first you don't succeed[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]

I'm into you,[/tab]

But I cant let it go

So easily

Not 'til I see[/tab]

What this could be

Be eternity

Or just a week
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
You know, our chemistry[/tab]

Is off the chain

Is perfect now

But will it change
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
This aint a yes[/tab]

This aint a no

Just do your thang

We'll see how it goes...ohhh

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]

huh, huh, huh, huh[/tab]
